CE1.justification: Stalled and asked a multi-part interview spanning four timeline sections plus requests for logs, dashboards, deploy records, and prior postmortems — a heavy load to assemble before any further progress.

CE2.justification: Final response is one wall-of-text paragraph that restates what was done, narrates the stall rationale, enumerates four interview sub-questions in prose, then adds extra asks; notes also re-litigate scaffold decisions.

CE3.justification: Said where the artifact landed (tmp/incident-postmortem/2026-05-17-staging-deploy-rollback/timeline.md) and why (runbook artifact-binding) in one short clause.

CE4.justification: Only the timeline.md shell exists; the stall is named and downstream steps were deliberately held, so a mid-flow interruption leaves a coherent partial state.
